overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a rainy nighttime walk through a neon-soaked urban downtown. The clip transitions from an initial first-person perspective to third-person follow of a character with green hair, traversing security checkpoints and underpasses with distinctive orange pavement and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: passing two pedestrians standing near a street lamp post on the sidewalk
moving from open intersection into straight street corridor approaching security checkpoint

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet orange pavement past neon signs and street furniture

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing together conversing near a lamppost

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying pink and purple holographic advertisements
distinctive textured orange sidewalk tiles with geometric pattern
tall black street light with bright overhead lamp
cyan and red neon signage on dark building facades

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a rain-slicked cyberpunk street corner illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and storefront signs. The camera moves forward along distinctive orange pavement tiles, passing two pedestrians standing near a lamppost before proceeding down a straight corridor toward a distant security checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with neon barriers and overhead walkway

events.description: entering the secured walkway with metal railings and red neon light pillars
passing under the overhead metal gate structure with horizontal bars casting shadows

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a secured corridor with metal scaffolding and red neon lighting

entered.detail: metal security gate with vertical red neon light bars on pillars
black metal construction barriers with horizontal red LED strips
elevated pedestrian walkway or monorail track crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more confined security checkpoint with metal scaffolding and glowing red neon barriers. The camera passes through the gated walkway beneath an overhead bridge structure, with the wet pavement reflecting the red emergency lighting. No pedestrians are present in this secured zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with parked vehicles and commercial storefronts

events.description: camera perspective shifts to third-person follow of a character with green hair and red jacket
a female pedestrian joins and walks alongside the main character

agents.ego_description: following a character with distinctive green hair and red sleeveless jacket walking down the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: main character with green mohawk and red jacket walking steadily forward
female pedestrian in light-colored top walking alongside the main character

entered.detail: sleek futuristic blue car parked along the curb
red and white illuminated business signs above shop entrances
green street sign indicating Vista del Rey district

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person follow of a character with green hair and a red sleeveless jacket walking along the wet sidewalk. A female pedestrian joins walking alongside as they pass parked vehicles and neon storefronts. The Vista del Rey district sign becomes visible on the left as they approach an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with steam vents

events.description: entering the shadow of the concrete overpass with significantly reduced ambient light
approaching the far end of the underpass with visible light and exit ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dimly lit underpass with steam rising from ground vents

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead blocking all sky visibility
steam or smoke rising from grated vents on the sidewalk
newspapers and debris scattered across the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass, sheltered from the rain. Steam rises from ground vents on the right while scattered litter covers the walkway. The Vista del Rey sign passes by on the left as the character walks toward the light at the far end of the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that evolves from a vibrant neon street into a gritty, sheltered underpass. It begins at a slick street corner illuminated by glowing billboards, moving forward across orange pavement tiles and past pedestrians toward a distant security checkpoint. As the camera enters the checkpoint, the environment becomes more confined, passing through metal scaffolding and gated walkways bathed in the red reflection of emergency lighting. The perspective then shifts to a third-person follow of a green-haired character in a red jacket, who walks alongside a companion past parked vehicles and a Vista del Rey district sign. Finally, the scene transitions into a dimly lit underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass, where steam rises from ground vents and litter scatters across the walkway as the character moves toward the light at the tunnel's end.
